text.title: aws-well-architected-framework Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for aws-well-architected-framework. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: WAFR assessments MUST run under a read-only IAM role. The agent reads Organizations OU tree, IAM Identity Center assignments, CloudTrail org-trail status, Config aggregator state, GuardDuty detector status, and Security Hub enabled standards. It MUST NOT call any mutating API during discovery. All remediation is emitted as Terraform plan or CloudFormation StackSet diff for human review before apply.
rule.rationale: Running discovery under read-only prevents accidental mutation and keeps the audit trail clean. Emitting IaC diffs instead of imperative CLI calls means every remediation is reviewable, revertable, and tracked in version control.

rule.statement: Each pillar MUST be scored 1–5 with at minimum one concrete evidence item (resource ARN, policy snippet, or Config rule finding) per finding. Findings without evidence are marked UNVERIFIED and do not count toward the score. Output format: JSON array with fields pillar, score, findings (each with severity, evidence, remediation_terraform).
rule.rationale: Concrete evidence distinguishes real findings from assumptions. A score without evidence is an opinion; a score with an ARN and a policy excerpt is a finding that can be reproduced and closed.
